{"cards": [{"name": "Forge of Possibilities", "mana_cost": "{2}{R}{R}", "cmc": 4, "colors": ["R"], "color_identity": ["R"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "Choose one —
• ~ deals 4 damage to any target.
• Create two 1/1 red Goblin creature tokens with haste.
• Destroy target artifact.", "flavor_text": ""Fire shapes both metal and destiny." —Koth of the Hammer", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "Modal red instant that tests 'Choose one' formatting. Offers three classic red effects at appropriate power level for 4 mana rare. Each mode is worth roughly 2-3 mana, making this flexible but not overpowered."}, {"name": "The Verdant Awakening", "mana_cost": "{2}{G}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["G"], "color_identity": ["G"], "type_line": "Enchantment — Saga", "oracle_text": "I — Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
II — Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.
III — You gain 3 life for each creature you control.", "flavor_text": null, "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "Green Saga that ramps, pumps creatures, then provides life gain payoff. Each chapter builds on the previous, creating a cohesive green strategy. Appropriately costed at 3 mana for rare complexity."}, {"name": "Crystal Sanctum", "mana_cost": "", "cmc": 0, "colors": [], "color_identity": [], "type_line": "Land", "oracle_text": "~ enters the battlefield tapped.
{T}: Add {C}.
{3}, {T}: Scry 2.", "flavor_text": "Within its walls, the future reveals itself to those patient enough to look.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "Colorless nonbasic land with utility ability. Enters tapped to balance the scry ability. Scry 2 for {3} is appropriately costed for an uncommon land that doesn't fix mana."}, {"name": "Forest", "mana_cost": "", "cmc": 0, "colors": [], "color_identity": [], "type_line": "Basic Land — Forest", "oracle_text": "{T}: Add {G}.", "flavor_text": "Where ancient trees whisper secrets of the wild, druids find their truest calling.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Basic Forest with evocative flavor text. Standard basic land template with druid-themed flavor that connects to green's nature philosophy."}]}
